summary: Over the past year, the engineer focused heavily on maintaining a Telegram automation integration for n8n, shipping a major version of a Windows file-tagging utility, and building out a personal developer portfolio with automated CV generation. Additional work included polishing a Neovim configuration and creating a lightweight YOLO labeling tool.

items.title: Automated profile and CV generation
items.description: Built and refined a system to generate a dynamic GitHub profile with a CV timeline and sidebar cards.

items.title: Profile card generator maintenance
items.description: Iterated on a custom card generator, combining outputs into a single profile graphic and scheduling automated updates.

items.title: Clash.Meta fork maintenance
items.description: Maintained a fork of a network proxy tool, re-exposing specific APIs for a client application.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Polished a fork of a Telegram integration for n8n, resolving CI issues and adding a new trigger.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Prepared a major release of a Windows file-tagging tool, updating documentation and adding metadata support.

items.title: Personal Neovim configuration
items.description: Set up and polished a full Neovim IDE configuration, fixing compatibility and adding remote session support.

items.title: Lightweight YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Started a fast, on-host image labeling tool for personal projects, adding batch operations and UI improvements.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Iterated on the Telegram n8n node, fixing session storage and restoring required client parameters.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Shipped a major new version of the file-tagging utility and prepared it for store submission.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Worked on authentication improvements and general cleanup for the Telegram n8n integration.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Added Docker deployment support and updated documentation for the Telegram n8n node fork.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Maintained and extended a Telegram integration for n8n, focusing on authentication and deployment.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Worked on a major release of a Windows file-tagging tool, adding features and preparing store assets.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished the file-tagging utility with CLI support and UI improvements.
